name: Happy
message: I love seeing you happy! Your smile is contagious and it makes my day brighter. Keep shining, beautiful!
memory: Remember that day we laughed so much our stomachs hurt? That's one of my favorite memories.
activity: Let's celebrate! How about some ice cream or your favorite treat?

name: Sad
message: Hey love, I know things are tough right now, but I'm here for you. You're stronger than you think, and this feeling will pass. I believe in you.
memory: Remember how we got through that tough time together? We can get through anything as long as we have each other.
activity: Want to talk about it? Or we could watch your favorite movie together?

name: Stressed
message: Take a deep breath. You've got this! You're capable of handling whatever comes your way. Take it one step at a time, and remember I'm always here to support you.
memory: You've overcome so many challenges before. You're a fighter, and I admire your strength.
activity: Let's take a break together. How about some calming music or a short walk?

name: Excited
message: Your energy is amazing! I love seeing you excited about things. Your enthusiasm is one of the things I adore about you!
memory: Your excitement when you shared your dreams with me - that's when I knew how special you are.
activity: Let's do something fun together! What are you excited about?

name: Loved
message: You are loved. So deeply, so completely. Every single day, in every single way. You're my everything.
memory: Every moment with you is a moment I treasure. You make me feel complete.
activity: Let me show you how much I love you. Want to hear more reasons why you're amazing?

name: Lonely
message: You’re not alone, love… not even for a second. Even when I’m not physically there, my heart is always right beside yours.
memory: The way you hold my hand tightly when you feel low… it makes me want to protect you forever.
activity: Let’s talk for a while. Tell me what’s on your mind, I’m here listening to you.

name: Overthinking
message: Hey… breathe. I know your mind runs fast, but you don’t have to carry it alone. I’m right here, holding your hand through every thought.
memory: That night you told me all your fears and I hugged you until you felt lighter — I loved that trust.
activity: Let’s slow down together. Want me to reassure you or distract your mind with something cute?

name: Missing me
message: I miss you too… more than you know. But I’m always with you — in your heart, in your thoughts, in the love we share.
memory: Every time we said goodbye, our hearts were still connected… that feeling is still the same.
activity: Want a cute voice message or a romantic text right now?

name: Angry
message: It’s okay to be angry, love. Your feelings matter. I want to understand what hurt you — I’m here, not to fight, but to listen.
memory: Even during our tough moments, we always found our way back with love. That’s what makes us strong.
activity: Tell me what upset you… or should I first calm you gently with something sweet?

name: Insecure
message: Come here, love… you are the most precious person to me. Nothing could ever change how deeply I love you. Your heart is safe with me.
memory: Remember when you questioned if you were enough? I told you then, and I’ll tell you again — you are everything.
activity: Let me remind you how special you are… want a long comforting message?
